parts.text: Spent $15 on paneer tikka, took 1 hour, checking off my study habit, felt great today.
Had a 30 min morning run, ate 2 masala dosas for breakfast, my knee pain is a 4/10 today.
Slept poorly last night, only 5 hours. Bought groceries for $45.40 at Whole Foods.
Deep work session for 2.5 hours on the bodhi project. Skipped my meditation habit.
Just woke up after 8 hours of solid sleep. Gonna eat a banana and go for a 45 min bike ride. Feeling 8/10 mood.
Got a massive headache (8/10). Took some ibuprofen. Spent $12 at the pharmacy. Skipped gym today.
Cooked dinner at home so zero expenses. Spent 2 hours reading. Completed my daily reading habit. Sleep was okay, about 7 hours.
